overall.description: A first-person hiking video along a rocky mountain ridge under heavy overcast skies. The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow path beside a stone wall before emerging onto an open ridge with panoramic views of a vast valley and distant mountain ranges.

uneven dirt and rock path underfoot

heavy gray cloud cover covering the entire sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow mountain ridge path with a stone wall on the right side. The terrain is rocky and barren under an overcast sky, with distant mountains visible ahead through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: passing the end of the stone wall, the landscape opens to reveal expansive valley views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ridge line while the view opens to panoramic mountain scenery

distant rocky outcrops and geological formations

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone wall, the camera moves along an open mountain ridge with unobstructed panoramic views. The landscape reveals a vast valley and canyon system below, with mountain ranges extending in all directions under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a confined mountain path that gradually opens into a vast, panoramic ridge. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow, rocky trail flanked by a stone wall on the right under a heavy overcast sky. As the camera moves forward, the stone wall recedes, allowing the terrain to expand into an unobstructed mountain ridge. The scene then shifts from the enclosed path to a wide-angle perspective, revealing a deep canyon system and a sprawling valley below. Finally, the view opens completely to show distant mountain ranges extending in all directions through the hazy atmosphere.
